title: chore(rename): BaselineOfClaudeMessaging → BaselineOfClaudeSDK
description: Rename Metacello baseline class for dual-scope SDK. Move src/BaselineOfClaudeMessaging/BaselineOfClaudeMessaging.class.st → src/BaselineOfClaudeSDK/BaselineOfClaudeSDK.class.st. Consumer URL: baseline: 'ClaudeMessaging' → baseline: 'ClaudeSDK'. Update README install snippet, CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP. Tag v0.5.1 (breaking-name rename, no API surface change).

title: chore(rename): local dir claude-messaging-pharo → anthropic-sdk-pharo
description: Rename on-disk directory to match GitHub repo. Update Makefile's two Iceberg registry lookups (r name = 'claude-messaging-pharo' → 'anthropic-sdk-pharo'). Document upgrade path for existing local clones (re-clone or git-mv + Iceberg remap).

title: chore(monorepo-cutover): delete Messaging packages from claude-agent-sdk-smalltalk (deferred)
description: Per design doc §16: atomic PR on monorepo deleting 9 Claude-Messaging-* + 9 -Tests + PharoKeyring* packages, updating slow-suite.yml test expression to ClaudeAgentTestSuite fullSuite, dropping messaging-specification.tex from monorepo docs.yml, updating Makefile LOAD_PACKAGES_EXPR. DEFERRED until anthropic-sdk-pharo lands rename + ADRs + baseline + v0.6 Batches. P3 reflects deferred status; promote when ready.

title: docs(design): ADRs for two-family naming Claude-Messaging-* + Claude-ManagedAgents-*
description: Capture in DESIGN.md the naming policy aligned with Anthropic's vocabulary. ADR 1: two package families — Claude-Messaging-* (Messages API surface, existing) + Claude-ManagedAgents-* (Anthropic's beta Managed Agents API: sessions, memory_stores, agents, environments, user_profiles, vaults). ADR 2: ClaudeClient in Claude-Messaging-Client gains Managed-Agents methods via Pharo extension methods from Claude-ManagedAgents-* packages. ADR 3: 'ManagedAgents' chosen to align with Anthropic's docs vocabulary AND to disambiguate from the monorepo's Claude-Agent-* local in-image runtime. Updates CLAUDE.md naming + ROADMAP entries (v0.7-v0.11 packages list new prefix).
